item.title: The $125 Million Candy Heiress Who Vanished Without a Trace
item.description:
Helen Brach, a wealthy widow tied to the Brach’s candy fortune, disappeared on February 17, 1977, after leaving a medical visit in Minnesota. She was never seen again and was later declared legally dead in 1984.
Investigators uncovered fraud schemes involving horse dealers linked to her finances, and one suspect was later convicted of defrauding her but not her disappearance. Despite decades of investigation, her body has never been found.

media:content.media:title: The $125 Million Candy Heiress Who Vanished Without a Trace
media:content.media:description:
Helen Brach, a wealthy widow tied to the Brach’s candy fortune, disappeared on February 17, 1977, after leaving a medical visit in Minnesota. She was never seen again and was later declared legally dead in 1984.
Investigators uncovered fraud schemes involving horse dealers linked to her finances, and one suspect was later convicted of defrauding her but not her disappearance. Despite decades of investigation, her body has never been found.

item.title: What Happened to the 3-Year-Old William Tyrrell?
item.description:
William Tyrrell, 3, vanished on September 12, 2014, while playing outside his foster grandmother’s home in Kendall, Australia. He was last seen wearing a Spider Man suit, and his disappearance triggered one of the country’s largest investigations.
For years, authorities believed he may have been abducted. More recently, investigators have explored alternative theories, including the possibility of an accidental death, though no definitive evidence has confirmed what happened.

media:content.media:title: What Happened to the 3-Year-Old William Tyrrell?
media:content.media:description:
William Tyrrell, 3, vanished on September 12, 2014, while playing outside his foster grandmother’s home in Kendall, Australia. He was last seen wearing a Spider Man suit, and his disappearance triggered one of the country’s largest investigations.
For years, authorities believed he may have been abducted. More recently, investigators have explored alternative theories, including the possibility of an accidental death, though no definitive evidence has confirmed what happened.
